questions.question: What is the primary goal of a Context-Free Grammar (CFG) in syntactic analysis?
options: A) To assign parts of speech to words
B) To identify the grammatical structure of a sentence
C) To generate all possible sentences from a dictionary
D) To recognize the syntax of a language
questions.explanation: A Context-Free Grammar (CFG) is a mathematical framework used to describe the grammatical structure of a language. It provides a set of production rules to generate all possible sentences from a dictionary.

questions.question: Which parsing technique involves breaking down a sentence into its constituent parts from the top down?
options: A) CYK Parsing
B) Top-down Parsing
C) Bottom-up Parsing
D) Lexical Parsing
questions.explanation: Top-down Parsing involves analyzing a sentence from the top down, considering the overall structure of the sentence and then breaking it down into smaller components.

questions.question: What is CYK Parsing?
options: A) A parsing technique that uses a table to keep track of the parse tree
B) A parsing technique that uses a stack to keep track of the parse tree
C) A parsing technique that uses a queue to keep track of the parse tree
D) A parsing technique that uses a tree to keep track of the parse tree
questions.explanation: CYK Parsing (Context-Free Grammar Parsing) is a parsing technique that uses a table to keep track of the parse tree. It is an efficient algorithm for parsing context-free grammars.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes Bottom-up Parsing?
options: A) Breaking down a sentence into its constituent parts from the top down
B) Breaking down a sentence into its constituent parts from the bottom up
C) Using a stack to keep track of the parse tree
D) Using a table to keep track of the parse tree
questions.explanation: Bottom-up Parsing involves analyzing a sentence from the bottom up, starting with individual words and then combining them to form larger components.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a type of parsing technique used in Syntactic Analysis?
options: A) Top-down Parsing
B) Bottom-up Parsing
C) Lexical Parsing
D) Semantic Parsing
questions.explanation: Semantic Parsing is a type of parsing technique that involves analyzing the meaning of a sentence, rather than its grammatical structure. It is not typically considered a type of syntactic analysis.
